title: helichrysum leucopsideum
intro: Helichrysum leucopsideum, also known as the white icosanth, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its clusters of small, white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, infections, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Helichrysum leucopsideum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and easing symptoms of arthritis, as well as its potential to alleviate anxiety and stress. Helichrysum leucopsideum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
